EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IUNTraceConfiguration

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a utility network trace configuration.

[Guid("EA62BF80-86F4-499A-B9E7-B9735A33840A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUNTraceConfiguration

Properties

AllowIndeterminateFlow

Returns allow indeterminate flow

bool AllowIndeterminateFlow { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
